items.description: Olive utility jacket layered over white top with baggy light-wash jeans, white sneakers, cream tote bag
items.why_i_like_it: The layering is so practical for Galway weather — olive is one of my favorite colors and the baggy jeans with a structured jacket feels like something I'd actually wear walking into town. The cream tote pulls it together.
items.could_turn_into: OOTD content, 'what I wore to Galway market' type post

items.description: Light blue open shirt over black top + baggy black pants, white sneakers, black crossbody
items.why_i_like_it: The pale blue breaking up all black is chef's kiss. Simple but looks intentional. This is the kind of outfit where people ask where you got everything.
items.could_turn_into: flat lay content, style breakdown reel

items.description: Soft pink sleeveless top + high-waisted wide-leg khaki pants, woven crossbody bag
items.why_i_like_it: This feels like a Galway summer morning outfit. Soft, earthy, breathable. The woven bag adds texture without trying too hard.
items.could_turn_into: beach day outfit, coffee shop content

items.description: Sage green shirt layered over white top with cream pants, casual summer street style
items.why_i_like_it: Sage green is my color. The white underneath keeps it fresh and the cream pants make the whole thing feel calm and put-together. Would wear this to death.
items.could_turn_into: brand collab potential, 'my go-to summer uniform' post
